description_long: This object is a Japanese-style katana sword with a gently curved, single-edged blade. The blade is decorated with a colorful, collage-like pattern featuring various images and hues, giving it a unique and modern appearance. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a blue and black design with white text, and appears to be made for a comfortable grip. A simple, round guard separates the blade from the handle, providing protection for the user's hand. The sword's overall construction suggests a blend of traditional form with contemporary, urban-inspired aesthetics. The materials and finish indicate it is both functional and visually striking, suitable for display or use.
description: A Japanese-style katana sword with a colorful patterned blade and a blue-black handle featuring white text, separated by a round guard. The design blends traditional form with modern, urban-inspired decoration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved, patterned blade and the blue-black handle with white text.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular guard and the cylindrical handle, with the blade's edge barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's curve and pattern, as well as the handle's design from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's end and the round guard, with the blade extending away.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, blue and black with white text, smooth, likely plastic or synthetic wrap
attribute_ornamentation: colorful collage pattern on blade and handle
